claims.claim: ExperienceDeltaV1, ExperienceDeltaBusV1, and SolidificationGradientV1 act as a read-only truth channel for felt-state transformations.
evidence: capsules/spectral-bridge/src/types.rs: ExperienceDeltaBusV1::from_deltas keeps live_vector_write=false and live_authority_write=false

claims.claim: The crystallization index weights should be first-class to avoid semantic drift from similarly named resonance stability weights.
evidence: capsules/spectral-bridge/src/types.rs: SOLIDIFICATION_GRADIENT_*_WEIGHT constants and bounded basis entries

claims.claim: Solidification should reach structural_solidification_with_persistent_lattice only when the crystallization index and solidification evidence both cross threshold.
